description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should use a matrix strategy to test on multiple platforms (ubuntu-20.04, macOS, Windows) and Python versions (from 2.7 to 3.11 and PyPy), with different dependency sets (none, scipy). For each job, check out the code, set up the specified Python version, install build tools with pip, optionally install additional dependencies, and run tests with tox.
